codeReview.summary: Implementation matches the feature scope: /convert page, streaming structured conversion via /api/convert, progressive rendering (ingredients/steps/Thermomix/warnings), and post-conversion save flow. One non-blocking API validation gap was found.

issues.description: Whitespace-only recipe text is accepted by API validation because `recipeText` only uses `.min(1)` without trimming. UI blocks whitespace input, but direct API callers can still trigger conversion with blank content (avoidable token usage and weaker input guard).

sharedStateObservations.observation: The `fullstack-worker` skill requires agent-browser manual verification, but this worker session did not invoke `agent-browser` (skill calls were `mission-worker-base` and `fullstack-worker` only). Given known Clerk headless auth challenges, the skill may need an explicit fallback path (documented non-browser verification steps when auth automation is blocked).
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/skills/fullstack-worker/SKILL.md:16,63-68 requires agent-browser; transcript skeleton for workerSessionId 5ed92a08-bdd8-4275-837f-877009f6afe0 shows no `Skill` call for `agent-browser`; .factory/library/user-testing.md:35 documents Clerk/Cloudflare headless auth blocking.

summary: PASS with 1 non-blocking issue: the API accepts whitespace-only `recipeText` because server-side validation does not trim input. Feature behavior and core implementation are otherwise complete and aligned with requirements.
